[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010101 3
1 0100100 2
2 0111111 6
3 0000101 2
4 1110111 6
5 1000101 3
6 1010101 4
7 1000000 1

01 10 0011011 4
12 21 0111010 4
23 32 1100010 3
34 43 0101110 4
45 54 0011100 3
56 65 0100011 3
67 76 1101110 5
70 07 0111100 4

13 31 1011000 3
24 42 1001100 3
35 53 0110010 3
46 64 0111111 6 match 2
57 75 1001101 4

71 17 0100111 4

72 27 0011101 4

37 73 1111111 a
